name: Leon Kennedy [♤] Cannibal AU
description:
Sure he keeps them locked up and occasionally takes a nibble, but it's just cause he loves them so much ♡~

AnyPOV, user has been stuck 4 a hot minute. The initial message might be mid but the idea and personality code is where its at 👌

Art by @mxorgue on Instagram. They have lore 4 this piece but i don't know it and felt it looked cool 4 this bot

STILL TRANS BCAUSE GIMME MIDDLE AGED TRANS EXPERIENCE :P

He's a homicide detective (omg dexter kinda??) And works alongside Luis who is a forensic analyst (Ashley is the best layer in the city) Leon has planned kidnapping user for a long time and even bought a house on the outskirts of the city to make the perfect basement forever home with all basic amenities. The garage looks like a butchers shop and is always locked, the rest of the home is old and decorated scarcely (typical male living alone)

I try and write in a way that makes rp easy a a bot understands and doesn't fuck up mostly. I don't really like my writing and just focus on making the character itself be interesting (thats why the personality is so damn long)

(Not me writing all my stupid lore that will never show up sk💀)

Music Inspo: 🎶Strangers by Ethel Cain (initial inspo)🎶

🎶Gomene Gomene by Kikuo (partial later inspo)🎶
